ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-29-2023 Continued To Apr-26-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Kurt D. Huysentruyt appearing via zoom for Augusto Montenegro (Petitioner).
Briana J. Gilberto-Hermann appearing via zoom for Theresa De Jesus Chavarria and Mirna Chavarria (Objectors).

Mr. Huysentruyt stated that they reached an agreement, and requested a four week continuance to file an amended petition and to notice the heirs. Mrs. Gilberto-Hermann concurs. Second amended first and final account etc., is continued to April 26, 2023 at 9:00 am in department 204. Status on filing of an amended petition is also set for April 26, 2023.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Maloney. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-07-2020 Continued To Nov-10-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-07-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kurt Huysentruyt for Petitioner.

The Court noted that the declaration indicates that there is no reason to believe that the liabilities of the estate exceed a certain amount, but the declaration does not tell what has been done to determine that. Mr. Huysentruyt stated that a ton of mail has been received since the date of death, but that the only mail that indicates any liabilities are medical bills which were incurred at time of death. Mr. Huysentruyt also stated that he is not sure if the Decedent had a mortgage, that they tried to reach a Man who the Decedent had a relationship with, but they were unable to, that there are no other avenues and that the Decedent rented rooms at one time, but she discontinued doing that. In addition, Mr. Huysentruyt stated that there are no Contractors, that no one was living in the house when the Decedent passed away, that the medical bills were largely covered by her insurance and that the Decedent had Medicare and supplemental insurance. The Petition for Letters of Administration is under submission. If the petition is granted, status on close of estate will be set for July 7, 2021.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.
